title: WS-Federation Identity Provider Partner Configuration
description: Configuration for a WS-Federation Identity Provider partner within a Service Provider federation.

template_name.description: An identifier for the template on which to base this partner.

attribute_types.description: Specifies the types of attributes to include in the assertion. The default, an asterisk (*), includes all the attribute types that are specified in the identity mapping file.

endpoint.description: The endpoint of the WS-Federation partner.

include_certificate_data.description: Whether to include the BASE64 encoded certificate data with the signature. Defaults to true if not specified.

include_issuer_details.description: Whether to include the issuer name and the certificate serial number with the signature. Defaults to false if not specified.

include_public_key.description: Whether to include the public key with the signature. Defaults to false if not specified.

include_subject_key_identifier.description: Whether to include the X.509 subject key identifier with the signature. Defaults to false if not specified.

include_subject_name.description: Whether to include the subject name with the signature. Defaults to false if not specified.

max_request_lifetime.description: The amount of time that the request is valid (in milliseconds).

realm.description: The realm of the WS-Federation partner.

signature_algorithm.description: The signature algorithm to use for signing SAML assertions. Only required if sign_saml_assertion is set to true.

signing_key_identifier.description: The certificate to use for signing the SAML assertions. Only required if sign_saml_assertion is set to true.

sign_saml_assertion.description: Whether or not the assertion needs to be signed.

use_inclusive_namespace.description: Whether or not to use the InclusiveNamespaces construct. Defaults to true if not specified.
